approval: User standing authorization applied after direct inspection of all three actual PNGs on 2026-07-15

poses.review: Coherent industrial corridor: ceiling grid, floor perspective, structural columns, wall panels and hazard stripes align without tears or transpose artifacts.
North-facing nearby wall is correctly framed by ceiling and floor planes; texture scale, horizon and dark COLORMAP lighting remain internally consistent.
South-facing opposing wall is visibly distinct from north while preserving the same projection and palette integrity; no corrupt bands or missing pixels are visible.

reviewConclusion: Approved as the R1 first-light visible baseline. The documented nearest-hit-sector floor/ceiling limitation remains visible-scope-limited to R1 and is not accepted for final gameplay.
